Wines | Coppa Moncalvina Moscato DAsti,.description: Fresh and aromatically balanced with floral notes along with peach and pear overtones.

Wines | Domaine Ste. Michelle Brut, Colu.description: Delicate aromas of green apple, bright citrus notes with a persistent bubble and balanced acidity.

Wines | Don Miguel Gasc\u00f3n Malbec, M.description: Dark black plum and blackberry flavors with fruit-forward intensity, smooth and round finish.

Wines | Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Col.description: flavors of dark juicy plums, crushed blackberry, eucalyptus, and a hint of warm spice.

Wines | House of Brown Ros\u00e9.description: Jammy strawberry, cherry, delicate floral notes with lifted tropical flavors.

Wines | Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc, Ma.description: Crisp, bright notes of lime, gooseberry, and grapefruit lift the palate to a refreshing, clean finish.

Wines | MacMurray Estate Vineyards Pinot.description: Raspberry and cherry cola aromas and flavors are balanced in a silky and long, elegant finish.

Wines | Simi Cabernet Sauvignon, Alexand.description: Richly extracted blackcurrant and dark cherry flavors extend to a long, polished finish.

Wines | Sonoma-Cutrer Chardonnay, Russia.description: Flavors of apple, pear, and lemon zest highlighted with notes of toasted almonds and barrel spice.

Wines | Torre di Luna Pinot Grigio, Dell.description: Crisp and refreshing with zesty citrus, pear, and floral characteristics.
